quotes.verbatim_quote:
It was a concise list of what every jazz student should learn first, in order
to speak the language of jazz and communicate with others in that language!
quotes.why_load_bearing: Thesis statement of the method — frames the jazz language as a prescriptive curriculum.

quotes.verbatim_quote:
all the players studied shared the 18 devices,
and that there was very little left unmarked after citing those events
quotes.why_load_bearing: Empirical claim grounding the book's authority — the named elements account for nearly all the language used.

quotes.verbatim_quote:
digital patterns, the bebop scale, the bebop lick, and
enclosures.
quotes.why_load_bearing: First enumeration of the core elements that organize subsequent chapters.

quotes.verbatim_quote:
a certain grouping of ideas and
approaches will remain relatively constant, giving an identity to the style.
quotes.why_load_bearing: Theoretical premise for the entire method — a finite set of devices can define a style.
